message:
fix(cancel): ensure atomic retry-state restoration in CleanupCoordinator

Add a comment explaining why the pending lock must be held while clearing
the completed map in restore_retry_state(). The pending.insert() and
completed.remove() must be atomic with respect to register_pending() to
prevent a race where a symbol could be dropped during the reopen window
if another thread calls register_pending() between the two operations.

Also suppress the clippy::significant_drop_tightening lint on this method
since the extended lock hold is intentional for correctness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
